# terrible_community_general_openbsd_pkg (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) A name or a list of names of the packages.

### Optional

- `autoremove` (Boolean) Calls `pkg_delete -a` to remove automatically installed packages which are no longer needed.
- `build` (Boolean) Build the package from source instead of downloading and installing a binary. Requires that the port source tree is already installed. Automatically builds and installs the `sqlports` package, if it is not already installed. Mutually exclusive with `snapshot`.
- `clean` (Boolean) When updating or removing packages, delete the extra configuration file(s) in the old packages which are annotated with `@extra` in the packaging-list.
- `ports_dir` (String) When used in combination with the `build` option, allows overriding the default ports source directory.
- `quick` (Boolean) Replace or delete packages quickly; do not bother with checksums before removing normal files.
- `snapshot` (Boolean) Force `%c` and `%m` to expand to `snapshots`, even on a release kernel. Mutually exclusive with `build`.
- `state` (String) `present` ensures the package is installed. `latest` ensures the latest version of the package is installed. `absent` ensures the specified package is not installed.
